chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 25 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 18.03.2024 Mr. Muhammad Tarique Panhwar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ch. Shahid Hussain Rajput, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.1. With consent of all, Criminal Direct Complaint No.78 of 2023, Sessions Case No.403 of 2023 (Re: Maqbool Ahmed versus Muneer Ahmed and others) is withdrawn from the file of Additional Sessions Judge, Ghotki and is transferred to Additional Sessions Judge, Ubauro with direction to expedite the matter and decide it in accordance with law, within a period of four months. The criminal transfer application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
